temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) A man in a light-colored, striped dress shirt stands on a dark, outdoor balcony at night. He holds onto the railing with one hand, his other hand resting on the back of a chair. He gazes out at the city below, where the lights of other buildings are visible. The scene is dimly lit, with a single light source casting shadows on the wall behind him. A plastic sheet is draped over a piece of furniture nearby, fluttering in the wind. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a contemplative and somber mood, introducing a character who appears to be troubled or pensive as he looks out over the city.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins, accompanied by the sound of wind.)
